name: Show Tracker
description: Scans your TV library and cross-references with TVMaze to identify missing episodes and seasons. Provides a dashboard report, scheduled scanning, and a REST API.
overview: Tracks missing TV episodes and seasons using TVMaze

versions.changelog:
- Initial release
- TVMaze integration with rate limiting and caching
- Dashboard page with missing episode reports
- Scheduled nightly scanning
- REST API for external integrations
